info.name: fairregister
info.summary: Register Nextcloud files as Works in fairregister, with a registration certificate and proof of ownership at a specific point in time.
info.description:
This app integrates the [fairregister](https://fairregister.net) Work registration service into Nextcloud. fairregister is hosted in the EU by [fairkom](https://fairkom.eu/en) and is the successor of [RegisteredCommons.org](https://registeredcommons.org).
## What it does
- 🟢 Adds a **"Register with fairregister"** action to the three-dots menu of every file in the Files app. - 🔗 One click hands the file off to the fairregister web frontend with a single-use download token (5 minutes TTL, single-use, plugin-owned — not a public share link). - 📝 In the fairregister frontend you fill in metadata (title, type, license, contributors, language, …) and submit. A registration certificate is issued. - 🗂 The Nextcloud sidebar exposes a deep link to **My works** in fairregister for browsing and certificate download.
## What's *not* in this app
- No OAuth/OIDC client config on the Nextcloud side. The plugin issues download tokens server-side; the fairregister frontend handles user authentication on its own (against the same Keycloak realm fairkom operates). - No local state, no DB tables. The frontend is the source of truth for Work records.
## Admin setup
Settings → Administration → fairregister → click **Production** (or **Development**) preset → Save. That's the only configuration needed.
## License
AGPL-3.0-or-later. See `LICENSES/` inside the app folder for full text and per-file SPDX headers.
info.author: fairkom
